description: Policy for fusing evidence from multiple sources (database records and MOS log entries) in the BenchCore benchmark pack. Enforces join keys, validation rules, and traceability.

sources.description: Database records containing story metadata, status, and field values.
MOS protocol logs containing command history, timestamps, and status updates.

validation_rules.description: Every fused record must have a non-null join key that exists in both source datasets.
Timestamp ordering must be consistent: MOS log timestamps must not predate corresponding DB record timestamps for the same story_id.
No data loss: all records from the smaller source must be mappable to at least one record in the larger source.
Field conflicts between sources must be flagged. Resolution strategy: DB_RECORDS takes precedence for metadata fields; MOS_LOGS takes precedence for timestamps.
validation_rules.resolution_strategy: DB_RECORDS priority for metadata, MOS_LOGS priority for timestamps
